lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਛੂਟੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ko viralaa chhoottai tis jan kau hau balihaaree |3|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, a few rare ones are saved; I am a sacrifice to those humble beings. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਸਟਿ ਸਾਜੀ ਸੋਈ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਪਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jin sisatt saajee soee har jaanai taa kaa roop apaaro |
lines.english: The One who created the Universe, that Lord alone knows. His beauty is incomparable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਗਸੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬੀਚਾਰੋ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aape vekh har bigasai guramukh braham beechaaro |4|3|14|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Himself gazes upon it, and is pleased. The Gurmukh contemplates God. ||4||3||14||
Soohee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਕਰਣਾ ਸਰਬ ਰਜਾਈ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਚੈ ਜੇ ਕਰਿ ਸਕੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa karanaa sarab rajaaee kichh keechai je kar sakeeai |
lines.english: All that happens, and all that will happen, is by His Will. If we could do something by ourselves, we would.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਜਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਖੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aapanaa keetaa kichhoo na hovai jiau har bhaavai tiau rakheeai |1|
lines.english: By ourselves, we cannot do anything at all. As it pleases the Lord, He preserves us. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਾ ਜੋਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਜੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਿ ਹਮ ਸਾਕਹ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਬਖਸਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: asaa jor naahee je kichh kar ham saakah jiau bhaavai tivai bakhas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have no power to do anything at all. As it pleases You, You forgive us. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਤੇਰੈ ਵਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: mere har jeeo sabh ko terai vas |
lines.english: O my Dear Lord, everything is in Your power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਦੀਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jeeo pindd deea tudh aape tudh aape kaarai laaeaa |
lines.english: You Yourself bless us with soul, body and everything. You Yourself cause us to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਸਾਜੀ ਕੋਈ ਛੇਵਾ ਕਰਿਉ ਜੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਤਾ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: panch tat kar tudh srisatt sabh saajee koee chhevaa kariau je kichh keetaa hovai |
lines.english: You created the entire Universe out of the five elements; if anyone can create a sixth, let him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਤੂੰ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੇਹੇ ਕੋ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਜੇਹਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jehaa toon hukam kareh tehe ko karam kamaavai jehaa tudh dhur likh paaeaa |2|
lines.english: As You issue Your Commands, so do we act, according to our pre-ordained destiny. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਤੂੰ ਬੁਝਾਵਹਿ ਇਕਿ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਸਿ ਰੋਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eikanaa satigur mel toon bujhaaveh ik manamukh kareh si rovai |3|
lines.english: You unite some with the True Guru, and cause them to understand, while others, the self-willed manmukhs, do their deeds and cry out in pain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹਉ ਆਖਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਾ ਹਉ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਮੁਗਧੁ ਨੀਚਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: har kee vaddiaaee hau aakh na saakaa hau moorakh mugadh neechaan |
lines.english: I cannot describe the glorious greatness of the Lord; I am foolish, thoughtless, idiotic and lowly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਰਣਾਗਤਿ ਪਇਆ ਅਜਾਣੁ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੫॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau har bakhas lai mere suaamee saranaagat peaa ajaan |4|4|15|24|
lines.english: Please, forgive servant Nanak, O my Lord and Master; I am ignorant, but I have entered Your Sanctuary. ||4||4||15||24||
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
playing the many characters in different costumes;
but when the play ends, he takes off the costumes,
and then he is one, and only one. ||1||
The actor stages the play,
How many forms and images appeared and disappeared?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤਹਿ ਗਇਓ ਉਹੁ ਕਤ ਤੇ ਆਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kateh geo uhu kat te aaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Where have they gone? Where did they come from? ||1||Pause||
- when the fruit ripens, the seeds appear in the same form as the original. ||2||
Jewels and ornaments of many different forms are fashioned from gold.
I have seen seeds of all kinds being planted
Countless waves rise up from the water.
Doubt comes from greed, emotional attachment and the corruption of Maya.
The one sky is reflected in thousands of water jugs,
but when the jugs are broken, only the sky remains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਜਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: naa ko aavai naa ko jaahee |
lines.english: He does not come, and He does not go.
Freed from doubt, one realizes the One Lord alone. ||3||
He is imperishable; He will never pass away.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
The Perfect Guru has washed away the filth of ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਰੀ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak meree param gat hoee |4|1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have obtained the supreme status. ||4||1||
Whatever God wills, that alone happens.
Without You, there is no other at all.
O Lord, please preserve the honor of Your slaves. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਾਜ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan seve tis pooran kaaj |
lines.english: The humble being serves Him, and so all his works are perfectly successful.
He is permeating and pervading the water, the land and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਵਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tujh bin kavan kare pratipaalaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without You, who would cherish and love me? ||1||Pause||
I seek Your Sanctuary, O Perfect, Merciful Lord.
God dwells near at hand; He is not far away.
By trying to please other people, nothing is accomplished.
When someone is attached to the True Lord, his ego is taken away. ||2||
